elements.title: a large salmon statue
elements.contents: ... that a student magazine hypothesised what would happen if a large salmon statue (pictured) fought a trout statue in New Zealand?

elements.title: Indonesian Painters Association
elements.contents: ... that although the Indonesian Painters Association sought to develop a modern Indonesian art, its members had no shared style?

elements.title: Edgar J. March
elements.contents: ... that while writer Edgar J. March served as a war reserve constable during World War II, he tussled with a burglar and chased him on a borrowed bicycle?

elements.title: premise
elements.contents: ... that a faulty premise can turn a whole argument into a fallacy?

elements.title: the musical adaptation of Black Swan
elements.contents: ... that the musical adaptation of Black Swan rewrote the character of Thomas LeRoy as a woman to avoid writing a #MeToo story?

elements.title: Salvation Army Memorial Temple
elements.contents: ... that Philadelphia's Salvation Army Memorial Temple was once an American burlesque theatre?

elements.title: A Story About Fire
elements.contents: ... that A Story About Fire was animated by hand on 50,000 sheets of rice paper?

elements.title: Soonish
elements.contents: ... that the authors of Soonish had to remove a completed chapter from the book before publication?

elements.title: Haffen Park
elements.contents: ... that a large yellow bear taught 500 children how to wash their hands in Haffen Park?
